reviews.review_title: Nice experience but unplayable for me
reviews.review_description: I really like the look and feel of all of this developers work, and this one is no exception. However I have the same problem with this app I have with all their other apps on my S7, which is that it is extremely jittery and there's some white pixelation in the far left of the screen. The developer can't seem to replicate the issue, so unfortunately I'm just stuck not playing their apps, but definitely recommend for others

developer_response.body: WaterRide requires all the ram available, please restart your device and run again.

reviews.review_description: You get one free ride. Try it. It's free!!

This is a pleasant relaxing water ride that is OK for free but I would expect so much more if paid. The music is just awful with no way to turn it off. It would be great to just hear water sounds or have the ability to play your own music. Graphics are kind of dark and depressing, not that great, but that could be due to file size limitation on the Go. Not really enough to entice me to get the paid version which is hopefully faster and more exciting. if it goes on sale, I might try it. The country bumpkin like music really has to be changed or have the option of turning it off though!

developer_response.body: Keep in touch. Future updates will have several audio personalizations.

reviews.review_description: But no any visuals at dark screen on Oculus Go. The game is not playable yet.

developer_response.body: WaterRide requires all the ram available, please restart your device and run again.

reviews.review_description: I’ve ridden water ride express so many times and I love it, I’m now ready for the challenging water ride extreme. But how do I purchase it??
The free water ride is amazing!

For a free ride it is very good and it is tempting to buy the full experience. I had no problems loading unlike some of the other reviewers. I really liked the scenery and sudden drops. My only criticism would be that the splash and spray were not realistic enough to make it a completely convincing water ride. I think that if I had paid for this I would only give three stars. More choice of music would be nice too. But for free it deserves the five stars and everyone with an Oculus Go should try it, but have a bucket handy.
Liked it!
This game is a real joyride, I just loved it =)
..but Even better. Nice feeling of speed, tickels your guts. Try the free version! 3 stars!
Really nice.  Good way to try and then buy if you love it.
